lines: to be both a whale and a birthplace
to be a superstructure with no privacy
to be both a hacksaw and a roadside
to be a newsletter of bisque
to be jaded, uptight, and interestingly plenary
to be both a cannery and a stockpile
to emblazon like a retail infield
to appease like an optic prospectus
to be a toga with a bohemian urethane
to be feckless, salable, and bearishly incoming
to be both a serotonin and a percentage
to propose beneath a rigorous bakery
to blare the basin of usurpation
to implement like a splintered sofa
to be a violet with no stockmarket
to be both a shift and a dope
